conditioning: agglutinative + vowel-harmonic; TAM suffix precedes the person ending (gel-di-m)

examples: the person endings stacked after TAM
fit_none.note: the pivot recovers the definite past -DI and the infinitive cleanly; the aorist/progressive/future and evidential are sparsely attested or have no clean English correlate — the expected gap

prose: tur marks TAM with agglutinative, vowel-harmonic verb suffixes: definite past -DI, aorist/present -Ir, progressive -Iyor, future -AcAk, infinitive -mAk (+ evidential -mIş). The pivot recovers the past -DI and the infinitive; the aorist/progressive/future are sparser or lack a clean English correlate. Recommendation: PROMOTE past -DI + infinitive; flag the rest for more data / internal evidence.
